Venture Building

At Disrupt.com, we don't just fund companies – we build them. We take a dual approach to venture

building, combining internal ideation and external partnerships to accelerate growth.

At Disrupt.com, we don't just fund companies – we build them. We take a dual approach to venture building, combining internal ideation and external partnerships to accelerate growth.

Disrupt-led Ventures

  • Disrupt-led Ventures are born from our internal R&D and ideation engine.

  • Here, we identify high-conviction opportunities across Cyber Security, Automotive, Managed Cloud, Web3, and AI automation that we believe have the potential to scale globally.

  • Disrupt's leadership team is involved hands-on to validate the hypothesis and scale the venture effectively. We incentivise our teams and leadership to align their interest with the venture's long term success.

Founder-led Ventures

  • In Founder-led Ventures, Disrupt.com partners with exceptional founders who are in the early stages of validating or building their product.

  • We take the role of a fractional co-founder, providing the first cheque of investment and hands-on support to bring their vision to life.

  • We are founders with years of experience building and scaling world-class global products. We leverage our hands-on and capital-efficient expertise in Product, Go-to-Market, G&A, and our extensive network to significantly enhance your chances of success.

Investment

Disrupt Capital, the venture capital arm of Disrupt.com, is dedicated to backing exceptional Investors (GPs)/Funds and entrepreneurs scaling global tech products. Our investment strategy targets early-stage technology startups raising Seed to Series A funding rounds and that share our vision of transforming industries through disruptive technologies. We focus on startups that are committed to revolutionizing the way consumers and businesses engage with industries. We back founders with bold visions and provide them with the capital and hands-on support they need in order to scale quickly and successfully. Our approach combines deep industry expertise, operationalsupport, and access to a vast network, ensuring that our portfolio companies can reach their full potential.

Early-stage Investments:

We back strong founding teams raising Seed - Series A rounds.

Disruptive Technologies:

We invest in technologies that challenge existing paradigms and have the potential to drive systemic change across industries.

Scalable Solutions (Global or US focused):

We look for startups with the potential to scale globally, capitalizing on innovative business models and market opportunities.

ABOUT MADSGENCY

At MADSGENCY, we are a venture builder dedicated to partnering with ambitious entrepreneurs to build and scale high-potential businesses in the U.S. market. Evolving from a digital marketing agency, our name reflects our roots:

Marketing, And Development Services Agency.

By transforming our departments into independent ventures and identifying new opportunities for growth, we offer affordable, high-quality B2B services powered by skilled professionals—such as developers, designers, and other experts. Through hands-on expertise and strategic guidance, we help entrepreneurs overcome scaling challenges and achieve lasting success.

Careers

We are constantly on the hunt for the best and

brightest minds to collaborate with us.
